name: Hot Texas Chili Soup- Weight Watchers Favori2
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Beans, Kidney red - cooked and drained
1 cup Chilies, green (canned), rinsed, drained, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart slow cooker, combine all ingredients and 2 cups of water.
2. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours or on high for 2 hours, until the onions are tender.
3. Ladle evenly into 6 soup bowls.
